gomodel:run-figure1-005/tph1/enabled_by.snippet: tph-1 resolved to WB:WBGene00006600 (C. elegans); shown above ADF neuron in Panel E.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/ser6/enabled_by.snippet: ser-6 resolved to WB:WBGene00021897 (C. elegans); shown beside AWB neuron in Panel E.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/mod1/enabled_by.snippet: mod-1 resolved to WB:WBGene00003386 (C. elegans); shown above URX neuron in Panel E.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/tbh1/enabled_by.snippet: tbh-1 resolved to WB:WBGene00006541 (C. elegans); shown above RIC neuron in Panel E.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/nhr76/enabled_by.snippet: nhr-76 resolved to WB:WBGene00015497 (C. elegans); node in INTESTINE compartment of Panel E.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/atgl1/enabled_by.snippet: ATGL resolved to atgl-1 = WB:WBGene00015484 (C. elegans); node in INTESTINE compartment, downstream of nhr-76 in Panel E.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/tph1/molecular_f.snippet: tph-1 annotated to tryptophan 5-monooxygenase activity (rate-limiting enzyme of serotonin biosynthesis).

gomodel:run-figure1-005/tph1/part_of.snippet: tph-1 annotated to serotonin biosynthetic process.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/tph1/occurs_in.snippet: tph-1 GO CC annotation neuron projection; preferred over generic ADF cell-type term. ADF is the 5-HT neuron in Panel E.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/ser6/molecular_f.snippet: ser-6 encodes an octopamine receptor (IDA); consistent with receiving the 'Oct' signal from tbh-1/RIC in Panel E.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/ser6/part_of.snippet: ser-6 annotated to octopamine signaling pathway (IDA).

gomodel:run-figure1-005/ser6/occurs_in.snippet: ser-6 GPCR localizes to plasma membrane; ser-6 shown in AWB neuron in Panel E.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/mod1/molecular_f.snippet: mod-1 is a serotonin-gated chloride channel (IDA); receives the 5-HT signal from tph-1/ADF in Panel E.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/mod1/part_of.snippet: mod-1 annotated to serotonin receptor signaling pathway (IDA).

gomodel:run-figure1-005/mod1/occurs_in.snippet: mod-1 channel localizes to plasma membrane (IDA); mod-1 shown in URX neuron in Panel E.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/tbh1/molecular_f.snippet: tbh-1 is tyramine beta-hydroxylase, the enzyme producing octopamine (IMP).

gomodel:run-figure1-005/tbh1/part_of.snippet: tbh-1 annotated to octopamine biosynthetic process (IMP).

gomodel:run-figure1-005/tbh1/occurs_in.snippet: tbh-1 localizes to synapse (IDA); tbh-1 shown in RIC neuron in Panel E.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/nhr76/molecular_.snippet: nhr-76 is a nuclear hormone receptor / ligand-dependent transcription factor (IBA).

gomodel:run-figure1-005/nhr76/part_of.snippet: nhr-76 positively regulates transcription (IMP, PMID:24120942 — the figure's source paper); TF endpoint of the endocrine signal.
gomodel:run-figure1-005/nhr76/part_of.term_label: positive regulation of transcription by RNA polymerase II

gomodel:run-figure1-005/nhr76/occurs_in.snippet: nhr-76 nuclear receptor localizes to nucleus; acts in INTESTINE in Panel E.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/atgl1/molecular_.snippet: atgl-1 (ATGL) is the adipose triglyceride lipase; triacylglycerol lipase activity (IBA).

gomodel:run-figure1-005/atgl1/part_of.snippet: atgl-1 annotated to triglyceride catabolic process; in Panel E ATGL drives β-oxidation / fat loss (the downstream lipid-catabolism process).

gomodel:run-figure1-005/atgl1/occurs_in.snippet: atgl-1 localizes to lipid droplet (IDA); acts in INTESTINE in Panel E.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/tph1/has_output/.snippet: tph-1 produces serotonin (5-HT); arrow from ADF labeled '5-HT' in Panel E. Serotonin = CHEBI:28790.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/mod1/has_input/C.snippet: mod-1 is gated by serotonin (5-HT); receives the 5-HT signal produced by tph-1. Serotonin = CHEBI:28790.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/tbh1/has_output/.snippet: tbh-1 produces octopamine (Oct); arrow from RIC labeled 'Oct' in Panel E. Octopamine = CHEBI:17134.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/ser6/has_input/C.snippet: ser-6 octopamine receptor receives octopamine (Oct) produced by tbh-1. Octopamine = CHEBI:17134.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/nhr76/has_input/.snippet: nhr-76 transcription factor positively regulates the ATGL (atgl-1) lipase in the intestine to promote fat loss; atgl-1 is nhr-76's transcriptional target in Panel E.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/tph1/causal/gomo.snippet: tph-1 product is causally upstream, positive effect, of mod-1: serotonin (5-HT) made by tph-1 in ADF gates the mod-1 serotonin-gated Cl- channel (URX). Cross-cell, via the 5-HT intermediate (CHEBI:28790).

gomodel:run-figure1-005/tbh1/causal/gomo.snippet: tbh-1 product is causally upstream, positive effect, of ser-6: octopamine (Oct) made by tbh-1 in RIC activates the ser-6 octopamine receptor (AWB). Cross-cell, via the octopamine intermediate (CHEBI:17134).

gomodel:run-figure1-005/mod1/causal/gomo.snippet: Compartment-level 'endocrine signal' edge NEURONS->INTESTINE (dashed pointed arrow in Panel E): modeled as the most plausible upstream neuronal activity mod-1 (URX) causally upstream, positive effect, of the intestinal TF nhr-76. The paper title describes release of an endocrine signal from the neuronal circuit to control intestinal body fat.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/nhr76/causal/gom.snippet: nhr-76 indirectly positively regulates atgl-1: the nhr-76 nuclear receptor/TF drives expression of the ATGL (atgl-1) lipase in the intestine (transcription is the intervening module), promoting fat loss. Indirect relation per TF->target pattern.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/ser6/causal/gomo.snippet: Solid pointed arrow drawn from AWB (ser-6) toward ADF (tph-1) in Panel E, read as positive regulation. LOW CONFIDENCE (0.3) — flagged unconfirmed against the figure during vision verification; no specific literature located for ser-6 -> tph-1. Curator should verify direction/sign.

gomodel:run-figure1-005/mod1/causal/gomo.snippet: Dashed arrow from URX (mod-1) to RIC (tbh-1) in Panel E; dashed style read as indirect/modulatory positive regulation. LOW CONFIDENCE (0.3) — directionality and relation inferred from dashed glyph, flagged unconfirmed during vision verification. Curator should verify.
